verses.text: Amah in meihal biakna tau zong singkha sing tawh bawl a, a dung pi sagih leh alang, a vai pi sagih leh alang mah ahi hi. A ning kikim a, a san'na pi li leh alang ahi hi
Amah in tua tau-a' dingin a kiu lite-ah a kite a bawl hi. A kite, a tau tawh sakhat hi a, sumngo tawh a zut hi
Biakna tau nazat khempeuh, beelte, kawbiate, kuangte, sikkate leh vutluahna peekte a bawl hi. A nazat khempeuh sumngo tawh a bawl hi
Biakna tau-a' dingin a zawl nuai-ah, a kimciang a ban suk, a vang simsiam, sumngo siklen khat a bawl hi
A zawlte a len dingin sumngo siklen kiu lite' tunga ding a kual li a sung hi
Singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawl a, sumngo tawh tuate a zut hi
A puakna dingin biakna tau pangte-a om a kualte sungah a zawlte khum a, singpeekte tawh biakna tau a kuakin a bawl hi.
Amah in kikhopna buk kongkhakah na a sem numeite' limlangte panin sumngo tawh kisilna kuang leh a ngakna a bawl hi.
Amah in buktual a bawl hi. Leitaw lampang buktual-a puan kikhaite pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih hi a, pi za leh pi sawmnga a sau hi
A khuampite sawmnih hi a, a bullente zong sawmnih mah ahi hi. Sumngo tawh kibawl a, ahih hangin a vankhainate leh a gaknate ngun ahi hi
Leilu lampanga ding zong tua bangmah ahi hi
Nitumna lampanga dingin puan kikhai sukte pi sawmsagih leh pi nga hi a, a khuampite sawm hi-in, a bullente sawm mah hi a, a vankhainate leh a gaknate ngun ahi hi
A mailam, nisuahna lam-a dingin pi sawmsagih leh pi nga mah ahi hi
Kongpi pang khata ding puan kikhai sukte pen pi sawmnihlenih leh alang hi a, khuampi thum leh bullen thum tawh ahi hi
A pang langkhata ding zong tua bangmah ahi hi. Buktual kongpi hih lam leh hua lamah khuampi thum leh bullen thum tawh a puan khaisukte pi sawmnihlenih leh alang ahi hi
Buktual kimkota puan kikhai sukte khempeuh pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih ahi hi

Khuampite-a' ding a bullente pen sumngo hi a, ahih hangin a vankhainate leh a gaknate ngun ahi hi. A khuamluzepnate a kizutna zong ngun hi a, buktual-a khuamte khempeuh ngun kibawl gakna tawh kigak hi

Buktual kongpi puankhai pen a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem ahi hi. Buktuala kikhai sukte tawh kizui-in pi sawmthum sau-in, a vailam pi sagih leh alang sang hi
A khuampite li hi a, a bullen lite sumngo hi a, a vankhainate ngun hi a, a khuamluzepnate leh a gaknate a kizutna ngun mah ahi hi
Biakbuk leh buktual kimkota ding khetphimte khempeuh sumngo ahi hi.
Hihte pen siampi Aaron' tapa Ithamar' vaihawmna nuai-ah Levi mite' sep ding Topa' omna ahi biakbuk-a dingin Moses' thupiakna tawh a kisim van malte ahi hi
Judah minam Hur' tapa ahi Uri' tapa Bezalel in Topa in Moses a thupiak khempeuh a bawl hi
A khut siam, a geel siam, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte a zem, Dan minam, Ahisamak' tapa Oholiab in zong amah a huh hi
Nasepna dinga a kizang kham khempeuh, biakbuk lamna-a a kizang, a kipia khamte, biakinn shekel-in talen sawmnihlekua leh shekel za sagih sawmthum ahi hi
Mi simna sungah a kihel mihonte tung panin a kingah ngunte, biakinn shekel-in talen za khat leh shekel tul khat za sagih sawmsagihlenga ahi hi
Mi khat ciangin beka khat (biakinn shekel-in shekel lang) pai pia a, a pia mi, kum sawmnih a pha panin a tungsiah mi kisimna-a a kisim peuhmah tul za guk leh tul thum leh za nga leh sawmnga ahi hi
Ngun talen za khatte pen biakbuk khuam bullente leh dalna puan khuam bullente dingin sun' ding ahi hi. Talen za khatte bullen za khat, bullen khat ciangin talen khat ahi hi
Amah in shekel tul khat za sagih sawmsagihnga pen khuampi tunga vankhaina dingin bawl a, a khuamluzepnate zutin tuate-a' ding gakna a bawl hi
A kipia sumngo khempeuh, talen sawmsagih leh shekel tul nih leh za li ahi hi
Amah in tua tawh kikhopna buk kongkhakte-a' dingin khuam bullente, sumngo biakna tau leh a sumngo siklen leh biaknatau nazat khempeuh
buktual kimkota khuam bullente, buktual kongpi khuam bullente, biakbuk khetphimte khempeuh leh buktual kimkota khetphim khempeuh a bawl hi.
